star_1.text: 🎥Camera is WAY too zoomed-in, meaning taking corners is unnecessarily hard. Graphics are nice as is the mixing-and-matching of car parts. It's also great that you can play offline with no InterNet access required which is what I do all the time (with this and other Games).

First, I don't think this game deserves a 1 star. I rated this 1 star to make the devs see my review. The game is really good and really fun but one day I suddenly lost all my progress and achievements when I opened the game. The device I'm using is Samsung M30S. And I'm having trouble connecting my google account. If the devs fix this issue, I'm changing the review :)

This is beyond awful for an "arcade" racing game You can't see the turns in front of you, and the arrows they have appear way too late when it's too late to make corrections I'd be okay with the low field of view and awful corner awareness if the game had a basic minimap, but it doenst even have that! The only way to correctly play this game is by remembering the course, and that's not what an arcade game should drive it's players to do

This game is definitely not ready for the market. It doesn't quite seem play tested, it's full of lags and the menu doesn't seem to work either. Please try to fix this or else my rating isn't going to change.
This game sucks it would be alright on a games console where you have a joystick to use for steering no settings for controls, do not bother.
Game probably has potential but I cant find out how to go through menu to choose race or upgrades. They aren't touch based and I see no arrows. I'm on galaxy s21.
I knew it was gonna be garbage and i still downloaded it. The handling is garbage, It has no grip. Super unresponsive controls, No car sounds. So overall, It's a trash game and i wish it didn't exist

you don't understand my problem if i have 14000 credits i want to spend it on more than 1 upgrade but this game will only allow 1 upgrade after each race FORGET IT the game is poor effort by developer should be banned by Google play i am UNINSTALLING
1 star purely because I hate the way leaderboard names are chosen at random. Let me at least lock one of the 3 keywords in place.
Impossible to beat ice man boss not even fair add a mini map bro!!!! It will help 1000000% a lot if you add a mini map
It was way too frustrating and there was too much grinding involved in beating Kurt the first time!! 😡
this game really need mini map. too hard racing in blindness. 😭
Played for about an hour then the game crashed and wiped my save, nice
The game is great, real rc pro am feel. But it randomly wipes your data

I was drifting and had gone near the edge of a lake of some kind and the lake was on the right side of my car and it the wheels played twisters and gone to the right side of the car and fell into the lake
I hate this game cause I can't pass 10 th level 😠😠and it made me cry soo much
the full game was noticed in the middle of the game, you have to pay for it
Your game are rigged because those AI are faster and boss too
Bullshyt... The gameplay's okay but buying levels🤔
It all was turns left don't download it 😡😡😡😡😡😡😠😠

star_2.text: I tried this as I like Super Arcade Football on PC and thought it could be a nice little racer. It looks and plays great (big Amiga vibes) but I've only got to stage 11 before giving up. Ads are annoyingly frequent, rewards for watching them don't work, and it's wiped my progress 3 times now; enough to deter me from paying to remove ads (which I'd like to). There's a really lovely game here but it's sadly spoiled by these flaws.

There's nothing super arcade about this racing game. It's less exciting than the NES game Micro Machines. The controls are bad, making me press the gas again because I've been turning. Did you expect me to use one finger to play this game? It's in landscape, you know, with the left and right keys on the left and the acceleration and brake on the right. This is just a slow game without multi-touch support but with sub-par music and typical dialogue.

Game design is great but the turning commands are terrible. The car sometimes would not turn, and when it doesn't have to it does. I wish there was an option to change the control pad sizes as well, since i have big fingers and i press the wrong buttons often.

1 race, 1 ad. Too much, no thank you. Edited: I agree, nonetheless compared with other games, the ads are still too intrusive. I usually buy games I like, but in this case the ads didn't help to have a nice gaming experience. So, no go for me.
Fun Game, ads kill it, also didn't get bonus money for watching ads so it's a waste of time.
Games fun but the add time is > the play time. Almost forces tou to pay $2.99 to remove adds just so you can play the game...

It's a good difficult game but why would you pay for the rest just make it all free smh there's a really good consept and the game is good but why make it pay to play no one will stick around after level 10

Pls remove the ads the game is good but im not fully satisfaction with it.When i was playing in 9 and i completed it saids you need to watch an ad and the ad it talks about is the paying of full version
Cars move way too slow. Turning is slow. Just doesn't feel good to play.
The controls aren't to my liking, but nice artstyle.
Very little to do. Paid for no ad. Big mistake.
the controls are very hard, good game tho
not my cup of tea but decent effort to bring this classic back
Controls are exceptional for this type of game.
Hello .... plesea i can't pay your level because i am not offrod

star_3.text: Fun little retro racing game with confusing controls. Like sometimes I instinctively press the direction I want the car to go but it causes it to go the other way and right choice would have been to hold the opposite direction instead so bit of bummer learning curve on the controls l.

The controls the controls the controls. Very unresponsive so sometimes I dona turn and other times I end up hitting walls and im looming at my thumb and its right where its supposed to be. Very frustrating because I want to get great at this game. Ive got an All New Fire HD 8 from Amazon tablet. Other than that its a beautiful game. Outstanding graphics. Even for a dollar I wouldnt buy it if these controls are the way they are. Maybe its my hardware, idk

Great gameplay, terrible ending. EDIT: I am only referring to the ending of the storyline. 2nd EDIT: Make a sequel to this game with added depth to the gameplay, visuals, a continued story or something as well, it was a shame as the racing part was really fun yet quite short.

Loving the experience but I am foing to have ti put the game down for a while. I'll check back because Im sure a feature id like is highly requested. But because of the camera and no mini map is feels near impossible to take on a race and win 1st try. After 1-2 races I have a knowledge of where ramps, and curves are as there is little warning of whats ahead.

i like the pixel graphic and gamestyle but somehow isnt get me to play with it. just simply not fun. very easy comming the time when you cant beat enemy just if you play the map 4-5-10 times to know the map perfectly. wich means, dosnt matter yout technic only matter your knowladge. thats bad.
Great game. Addictive and worth playing. Only drawback is the direction controls are a bit close together. Would be good to have them either further apart or give us an option to do so in settings.

The graphics are very cool and fun, the concept/idea is great but the handling is just bad very very bad, and the grindyness of the whole thing sucks too, well for a free game isn't bad but I feel this is a miss potential to be a great game.

What should a great, simple, relaxing and addictive game is ruined and turned into a steaming pile of the smelliest horseshit, by the worst steering controls ever devised. Way to ruin a load of development time guys, well played. 👏👏👏
The game is extremely interesting but missions or levels are too small at least increase it till like level 100 or more than to enjoy it more than before?
Why don't your settings save across multiple devices? The gameplay is fun, I just hate that my progress isn't synced
Fantastic game. Every race there is an ad.
Plzz make super arcade racing 2 if you make it I will give 5 star plzz
nice game, but the unlocks are pretty expensive
Not bad...but a little bit hard and boring.😧
bulletin. Fun for no more than 48 hours.

star_4.text: Glorious. Handles well, looks nice, the racing is satisfying, secret levels were a fun surprise. Its neither ultra realistic nor trying to be. I upgraded fully without spending money & with what I consider to be minimal grinding (your mileage may vary). The app is unintrusive, the story is skippable with relative ease, the challenge is just right. A couple of tracks' layouts are disorientating, some of the path arrows are misleading, some tracks have too many alternate paths. Well worth playing.

Absolutely brilliant nostalgic racing game. Love it. Only annoyance is I feel like I'm forced to watch ads to afford car upgrades ingame. I'd much rather just make a one off purchase and get the full ingame credits without sitting through an ad. EDIT: This option exists, I just hadn't found it yet. Awesome. £9.99 is maybe a little expensive though. If it was £4.99 I'd do it in an instant. Maybe when payday rolls around.

As a story-driven game, this really needs a mini-map--even one shown just before the race--so you have an idea of the racing-line. Replaying a level just to memorize it takes away from the story, especially on the boss races. As a straight-up racing game though, it's pretty great. (What does the (b) button do? I would have thought it would apply the breaks, but it seems to do nothing; it would be useful if it applied the breaks)

Creative and simple, the 2D artwork integrates as a pixel driven story with the menu systems lit up in glorious neon, with characters that take you back to the glory of the SNES and Megadrive gaming age. With the capability of providing a full console experience via it's gamepad support usable with Android TV box units. It's a little pricey at £4.99 to remove ads. Regardless.. It excretes nostalgia at every turn with a rad synthwave soundtrack to complement it and it does this superbly well.

Edit: this is the first time a dev has replied to me. The thing is that the levels are good and the storyline of the game is good too. But only if you could extend the story a bit more so that we get to know how our character started racing and if another evil group was made to end racing but we go on defeating them,etc.. the physics can be improved a slight bit so that the handling upgrade actually works. Btw love the 16 bit style graphics as I prefer that while making 2d games :P .

4 stars cuz I personally think it still needs improvements depit for 12 mb you get loads of customizations, tracks, levels and physics. But I have 3 things I wish this game could improve in. 1. I wish the vehicle upgrades can be more diverse and personalized. Maxed out cars seem dull for me with flat out 90 pts. I wish you can add a limited point system so cars can have characteristics based on how the player wants them to be. 2. More levels pls 3. Faster queue time?

Excellently made game Preffered Mini map to be given instead of Practice run as it doesn't allow to employ tactics and with real cars pushing each other is another ball game Achievements to pay out some rewards Better Multiplayer: couldnt find a single match with 20 minutes of searching atleast with bots since many achievements are locked for multiplayer.

Fun game level 5 is annoying as i cant upgrade my car past mark 2 that early in. This causes me to keep trying repeatedly as the black car kurt is slightly faster than you i have gotten within a tenth of a second. But to be fair i shouldnt allow my bad skill to lower opinins of the game as it is a good and well made game. So im going to stay semi netral at 4 stars. Thanks for the game .

Pretty cool retro racer. There was an arcade game back in the 80s, Ivan something, you used a wheel and it was trucks racing. This reminds me of that. The storyline also remind me of a certain cartoon about racing. Speed. The Achievements seen to be in game and not Google. At least the 6 or 7 I got so far. The upgrades are pretty hefty compared to winnings.

Level 10 onwards is paid. But I have to praise the customizability of the cars, it's much more than what I have expected. Also, sometimes it's laggy. Just out of nowhere, it's laggy. No matter where I am, in the menus, or in a race. Just... I need to wait for a couple of seconds for it to work again.
A great game but one slight bad point, we can't move the onscreen controls around, I find the steering buttons to far apart and I often miss left, but other than that it's a great old school racer.

This game is a hidden gem.It has everything.From a great storyline to challenging levels.The multiplayer mode is also a great aspect too. Would have given five stars if the controls weren't irresponsive sometimes. Great work by the developers still.

Well I have nothing to say about this devs but you just made my day sick why it's because great game great graphics and an excellent storyline and I thought the main character Mick I thought she was a male from the beginning, But she is a female what the flippin world is this I had fun a lot but one problem that I'm dealing with are the controls so angry that I could almost broke my phone still I love it thanks devs for this great game Super Arcade Racing thanks guys I do all appreciate it
I think the game is great, but I have a question. Has the achievements stopped working? I am getting the achievements in game but they are not popping up in Google Play Games.
The game is great.... Just hoping for some updates which would polish the game & make it shine! Thumbs up for the future retro games (maybe its time for a horror game😁) !
Controls are slightly loose and price of upgrades are expensive.. But still a great game... Niiice storyline...
Good graphics, great gameplay. Nice concept/idea behind the game.
Good game but it need more story and levels also more car bodies and graphics improvements
Fun game. Just wish there was a way to get the Google play achievements to work.
Very nice but please add more level and please enable car tuning.game like this very good with tuning car

star_5.text: I love this game. It took a good long while to beat (about 7 hours in all to get three stars on all races and beat the 10 bonus levels), which is good, I love mobile games that actually have an ending, it is a more rewarding experience. Please release more content or maybe a sequel! Cop chases would be fun and maybe an open world, just some ideas 😉

Only played 7 stages (1 boss) but overall I enjoy the game. Neat retro style graphics, easy to learn and play. Controls are good, but take some practice. I would prefer a virtual joystick that only moves left or right. (add the option, please). Has a lot of cars, courses, achievements, and other content. Even has a storyline, all this in a small size game. Updated: thanks to devs for info about ad removal and controller support 👍

Quite decent, but clearly is a rushed game. I like all the real races with 4 cars. Those are all fun. Then the paid game has an upgrade menu where you just need to click upgrade. Totally pointless. You also get free cash by just clicking it. Who programmed this? Then there are the big 1 on 1 races. Those are way too hard. You race a car that basically is magnetized to the track while your car glides all over the place. The tracks are horribly made too. Overall quite fun.

Thi is a great "little" game. It's funny, easy to play, and has enough depth to not get you bored quickly. Controls are surprisingly good too (for a mobile game). Multiplayer takes a bit too long to find an opponent (I guess that depends on the number of people playing at the same time), but the search for opponents happens in the background as you play, so it's not too bad. I wish there was some kind of way to play asynchronously against someone (e.g., Vs their ghost). Recommended!

Really fun game, I've put hours into it! With the layout of the tracks, I feel it could be possible to make a track editor, maybe make a barebones editor side to create and race your own tracks, add more options to users who have purchased to remove adds, or just make the whole thing exclusive. I'd love to see an idea like this implemented into the game, but other than that it's a 5* game!

I just finished all levels with 3 stars! It's the perfect arcade racing game. I don't care much for the story, dialogues are servicable at best. But I love the track designs, learning curve and the increasing level of difficulty. I love how the game allows you to defend your lead by taking creative corners and destabilising your opponents. I love the practice mode, as it helps you memorize the track and rely on your instinct in the actual race. Great game!

(spoiler alert)This game is mostly fine, it is one of the few games that successfully replicate the retro feel. Its tracks are mostly good, and it also has a wide selection of car bodies. It is not p2w and not swarmed with ads. Main issue of this game is something that other reviewers already seemed to have talked about, the FOV is too low and there's no minimap so predicting turns is hard. Also a track editor would've been cool. I would've also liked an option to be a male instead of a female.

I will start off by saying I play alot of games, but never post a review. But after playing this racing game I felt that if I could get even 1 person to try it, that they would have as much fun as I did, it would be it. This racing game has to be the funniest & and most challenging followed by the joy you get when you win. And repeat , I had a ton of fun ,short ads and I am searching now for a game that compares to this one, make more, this ones perfect.

HELP! IVE TRAVELED BACK TO THE 90S!! Huh, guess its not so bad... this game though! Looks and feels retro but plays like modern games with tight controls and polished mechanics, a great soundtrack, challenging races, and custom upgrades! Even starting off never felt like sliding around unless thats your aim. Its like a refined polished retro... ...thing (elequently put). The story even has a 90's vibe, but with multiplayer too its worth playing way into the future. A ton of fun, Support Devs!

Best racing game!!! I've been absolutely bored of all the others. This one has great controls, excellent ai, awesome cars, fun customization, a retro story, multiplayer, and the best tracks I've seen in a long time. Play this game if you love retro and cars...well done!!!!

Best racing game since Team 17's All Terrain Racing on the Amiga. Perfect for the train -short races, difficulty ramps up at a good rate. Similar to many 90s racers - ATR, Super Skidmarks etc. Gives you an option to purchase removes ads but once you do you also you recieve all the advert viewing bonuses - double coins etc. Wish more games did that.

I normally am not good enough at racing games to actually want to play them for long, but this game keeps me coming back. I love the attention to detail in the retro graphics! My only suggestion is that the controls could be customizable for where the buttons are. Great game!

Hands down for this game, im quite suprised for a game like this appear on the app store and the gameplay is very very nice, also reminded me of the games of my childhood, and also you can grind for coins in this game! If you dont want to pay or dont have money for it you can grind for coins by playing the completed levels coz it gives you the same amount of coins, the cutomization on cars are great and cheap too, so if you want a game that occupies your time in a few mins this is for you.

Love it! Love It!! LOVE IT!!! PLEASE make more games like this one. I really like how the game is challenging but not too hard. I also especially like the customization options. I don't whether the idea of combining car bodies was original or you got the idea from somewhere else but either it was a brilliant idea. FIVE STARS⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ To anyone who thinks I was told or bribed to say this: TRY IT FOR YOURSELF!

I don't often rate apps, let alone almost immediately after playing them but this game is everything a mobile game should be. Clear progress, incremental upgrades, great play for a few minutes at a time. Phenomenal little game.

10/10! This game has it all. Amazing,wacky and challenging races, a nice soundtrack, amazing boss stages, good graphics(for its genre), and you can actually customise your cars! I couldn't keep my eyes away from this game whenever I was playing it from start to finish. The challenging races make it even more interesting, the feeling of satisfaction you feel when you finally appear first after repeating a race for like five heckin times is just too good. Kudos to the guys who made this great game

This is simply amazing. Super fun,super retro and the soundtrack is a total banger. I love the fact that these developers are taking pixelation seriously and not just as a gimmick and the story is intriguing too, they've really put their work into it. So far my experience has exceeded my expectations. A definite recommend to any retro loving and pixel loving gamer. Keep up the amazing work devs, hoping for more of such honest games.

This is such an incredible game. The quality is astounding, Excellent graphics and music, challenging gameplay, fascinating story line, steady pacing, all of the aspects work so well together. That's why it's beautiful. I made so many memories with this game when I was trying to complete all the levels back in early quarantine, especially the bosses and secret levels. Great time killer! It was so much fun and I hope more people play this. Thank you for the people who made this one of a kind game

Great racing game, lovely graphics, challenging but beatable. So bad it's funny dialogue in the story sections. A load of tracks and fun to upgrade and customize the car with many options. Enjoyed my time with it a lot. Recommended!

The best arcade racing game in the play store. The story , arcade 2d graphics, gameplay is too good . Nice job developers. You guys just made an incredible arcade game. I have finished this game and enjoyed the story and the game so much. Thanks to all .❤️❤️❤️
